generated_queries: site:congress.gov "children safety" OR "minor protection" AND ("draft bill" OR "enacted law") AND date:[2023-07-01 TO 2023-10-01]

signals.title: Social Security Child Protection Act of 2025
signals.summary: This act mandates the issuance of a new Social Security number to children under 14 if their original number's confidentiality is compromised. It aims to enhance identity protection for minors.
key_provisions: Mandates new Social Security numbers for compromised identities of children under 14

signals.title: Children's Online Privacy Protection Enhancement Act
signals.summary: This proposed legislation seeks to amend the Children's Online Privacy Protection Act of 1998 to strengthen online safety measures for minors.
key_provisions: Amends COPPA to enhance online safety for minors

signals.title: Baby Food Safety Act of 2023
signals.summary: This act proposes amendments to establish limits on toxic elements in infant and toddler food, aiming to improve food safety standards.
key_provisions: Establishes limits on toxic elements in baby food

signals.title: FTC Negative Option Rule Amendment
signals.summary: The FTC proposed amendments to enhance transparency and consumer consent in subscription-based e-commerce models, addressing deceptive practices.
key_provisions: Mandates clear disclosures about subscription terms
Requires explicit consumer consent for renewals

signals.title: Digital Asset Market Clarity Act of 2025
signals.summary: This act aims to establish a regulatory framework for digital assets, defining oversight responsibilities and consumer protection measures.
key_provisions: Defines regulatory oversight for digital assets
Implements consumer protection for digital transactions

signals.title: Updated FTC Endorsement Guides
signals.summary: The FTC updated its endorsement guides to address deceptive practices in online advertising, including fake reviews and influencer marketing.
key_provisions: Clarifies deceptive practices in consumer reviews
